title: Tax' Creepy Mob
description: Creepy Mob is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to add glowing eyes to mobs.
body:
![00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52b16f60102392fcd043803a9c16cec6353cb3a9.png)

Overview:
Creepy Mob is a Minecraft resourcepack aims to add glowing eyes to mobs.
![01](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90d9e6c3ef50794e6673409b175b391208b9b520_0.webp)

Information:
This pack is aspecially written for the Cave Horror Project modpack. Try out this amazing pack. ETF (Entity Texture Feature) mod is needet.

Installation:
Just drag and drop the .zip file in the folder located at .minecraft/resourcepack, or just simply use the Curseforge client.

Permission:
You are allowed and welcome to use this modification in your modpack. 

Credit:
Written by Taknax
